title: juncus balticus f. pusillus
intro: Juncus balticus f. pusillus, also known as dwarf rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus balticus plant, a type of rush that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Juncus balticus f. pusillus include its ability to aid in respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
